headline: Nuxt.js
description: Nuxt.js (2016, Nuxt Labs) is the Vue.js equivalent of Next.js — full-stack framework with SSR, SSG, file-based routing, auto-imports, and modules ecosystem. Nuxt 3 (2022) rebuilt on Nitro server engine and Vue 3 Composition API. Nuxt 4 (2024) added Turborepo-like unified build.
